items.title: CVE-2026-16013 | liftoff-sr CIPster up to 632336d414ef708a542377c1aa8d6fdb7c70a760 cipepath.cc deserialize_symbolic out-of-bounds (Issue 53 / EUVD-2026-45163)

A patch should be applied to remediate this issue.
